Phase-5.NAME: Manual internal access and CLI provisioning parity
Phase-5.goal: Enable operator-managed internal users through backend provisioning with config export parity.
Phase-5.step-1: M-018: Add internal non-billable access model visible in normal subscription/VPN state.
Phase-5.step-2: M-019: Add backend CLI for internal user resolution, access provisioning, client provisioning and config export.
Phase-5.step-3: M-012/M-019: Convert deploy/create-client.sh into thin wrapper over backend CLI.
Phase-5.step-4: M-003/M-019: Verify config parity between manual and web-issued configs with idempotency and peer persistence.
